channel.title: Whamcloud Community JIRA
channel.description: This file is an XML representation of an issue

item.title: [LU-2247] Test failure on test suite lfsck, subtest lfsck
item.description:
This issue was created by maloo for sarah <sarah@whamcloud.com>

This issue relates to the following test suite run: https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/7031f4e6-21c3-11e2-b552-52540035b04c.

The sub-test lfsck failed with the following error:

test failed to respond and timed out

I think this is related to ORI-771

some e2fsck errors in suite_log:

e2fsck -d -v -t -t -f -n --mdsdb /home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2012-09-07/232903-7fbcd335b690/mdsdb --ostdb /home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2012-09-07/232903-7fbcd335b690/ostdb-5 /dev/dm-5
CMD: client-14vm4 e2fsck -d -v -t -t -f -n --mdsdb /home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2012-09-07/232903-7fbcd335b690/mdsdb --ostdb /home/autotest/.autotest/shared_dir/2012-09-07/232903-7fbcd335b690/ostdb-5 /dev/dm-5
client-14vm4: e2fsck 1.42.3.wc3 (15-Aug-2012)
client-14vm4: [ERROR] mkquota.c:427:scan_dquots_callback:: Usage inconsistent for ID 0: (1507328, 1030) != (36864,	4)
client-14vm4: [ERROR] mkquota.c:427:scan_dquots_callback:: Usage inconsistent for ID 0: (1507328, 1030) != (36864,	4)
Warning!  /dev/dm-5 is in use.
Warning: skipping journal recovery because doing a read-only filesystem check.
Pass 1: Checking inodes, blocks, and sizes
Pass 1: Memory used: 272k/0k (163k/110k), time:  0.15/ 0.03/ 0.02
Pass 1: I/O read: 9MB, write: 0MB, rate: 59.64MB/s
Pass 2: Checking directory structure
Pass 2: Memory used: 448k/0k (220k/229k), time:  0.01/ 0.00/ 0.00
Pass 2: I/O read: 1MB, write: 0MB, rate: 71.18MB/s
Pass 3: Checking directory connectivity
Peak memory: Memory used: 448k/0k (220k/229k), time:  0.20/ 0.04/ 0.02
Pass 3: Memory used: 448k/0k (219k/230k), time:  0.00/ 0.00/ 0.00
Pass 3: I/O read: 1MB, write: 0MB, rate: 11235.95MB/s
Pass 4: Checking reference counts
Pass 4: Memory used: 368k/0k (73k/296k), time:  0.02/ 0.02/ 0.00
Pass 4: I/O read: 0MB, write: 0MB, rate: 0.00MB/s
Pass 5: Checking group summary information
Free blocks count wrong (1699491, counted=1699132).
Fix? no

Free inodes count wrong (452467, counted=451441).
Fix? no
item.summary: Test failure on test suite lfsck, subtest lfsck

status.description: A resolution has been taken, and it is awaiting verification by reporter. From here issues are either reopened, or are closed.

comments.comment: Sarah has not seen this for a long time
